infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow NexGO Driver to use your current location for ride matching and navigation.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow NexGO Driver to use your camera for profile photos and required driver documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow NexGO Driver to access photos for profile pictures and document uploads.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow NexGO Driver to use your current location for ride matching and navigation.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow NexGO Driver to select profile and document images from your gallery.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow NexGO Driver to use your camera for required driver and vehicle document photos.
